reference: My daughter, who is four years old, may have suffered from an absence seizure this past weekend. She woke up and vomited, and then seemed dazed but was very tired as we had a long day. She threw up four times that night. She has not seemed to have any episodes since. Is vomiting part of absence seizures?
text: My daughter, who's three years old, nearly suffered from an absolute seizure this past season. She woke up and vomited over 19 days, but was very tired over her long day. She threw up four times that night. She had nothing to hide on the other side of the fence. The helmet and part of that continued.
